checks.description: Priority order consistency (report vs ranked JSON)

checks.detail:
Rank 1: 'Efficient Refusal Ablation in LLM through Optimal Transport' — only 2/6 keywords found in Sec 1
Rank 2: 'Dual-Modality Multi-Stage Adversarial Safety Training: Robustifying Multimodal Web Agents Against Cross-Modal Attacks' — only 0/14 keywords found in Sec 1
Rank 3: 'Turning Trust to Transactions: Tracking Affiliate Marketing and FTC Compliance in YouTube's Influencer Economy' — only 0/10 keywords found in Sec 1
checks.remedy: Section 1 must summarize all top-3 signals from the priority ranking.

checks.detail:
Priority 2: **추론**: 1 sentences (min 2)

checks.remedy: Expand shallow fields: Detailed Description needs >=3 sentences, Inference >=2, Stakeholders >=3 items, Monitoring Indicators >=3 items.

checks.description: STEEPs classification vs content consistency (flags for LLM review)
checks.detail:
Priority 1: classified as s_spiritual but only 0 content keywords found (min 2)
Priority 2: classified as T_Technological but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
Priority 3: classified as S_Social but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
Priority 7: classified as S_Social but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
Priority 8: classified as E_Environmental but only 1 content keywords found (min 2)
checks.remedy: Review flagged signals: classification may not match actual content. LLM quality-reviewer should assess these cases.

checks.description: Quantitative grounding (numeric values in Quantitative Metrics)
checks.detail:
Priority 1: '정량 지표' has 1 numeric value(s) (min 2). Content: "공격 성공률 +11% 향상; 특정 레이어 클러스터에서 거부 메커니즘 식별; 여러 LLM 아키텍처에서 재현 가능..."
Priority 2: '정량 지표' has 0 numeric value(s) (min 2). Content: "작업 완료율 2배 향상; MiniWob++ 벤치마크에서 교차 모달 공격 완화 검증; 적대적 커리큘럼의 다단계 훈련 파이프라인..."
Priority 3: '정량 지표' has 1 numeric value(s) (min 2). Content: "200만 개 동영상 분석; 540K 크리에이터 조사; 콘텐츠 카테고리별 준수율 정량화; 공시 메커니즘 효과성 측정..."
Priority 5: '정량 지표' has 1 numeric value(s) (min 2). Content: "시뮬레이션된 ENSO 변화의 ~90% 설명; 일시적 강화 단계 정량화; 장기 쇠퇴 궤적 모델링..."
Priority 6: '정량 지표' has 0 numeric value(s) (min 2). Content: "AI 대 인간 평가 조건에서 양의 증가와 질의 감소 측정; 무작위 배정의 통제된 실험 설계..."
checks.remedy: Each signal's Quantitative Metrics field must contain at least 2 distinct numeric values (e.g., dollar amounts, percentages, counts).

checks.detail:
Priority 1: **추론**: found 1 vague phrase(s): '향후'
Priority 5: **추론**: found 1 vague phrase(s): '향후'
checks.remedy: Replace vague phrases with specific, measurable statements. Avoid 'significant impact', 'will be important', 'remains to be seen' etc.

checks.description: Cross-signal synthesis in Section 5 (≥2 signal refs per implication)
checks.detail:
Section 5.1 item 1: only 0 signal reference(s) detected (explicit: [], keyword: [])
Section 5.1 item 2: only 0 signal reference(s) detected (explicit: [], keyword: [])
Section 5.1 item 3: only 0 signal reference(s) detected (explicit: [], keyword: [])
Section 5.2 item 1: only 0 signal reference(s) detected (explicit: [], keyword: [])
Section 5.2 item 2: only 0 signal reference(s) detected (explicit: [], keyword: [])
checks.remedy: Each strategic implication in Section 5.1/5.2 must synthesize insights from at least 2 signals. Add explicit signal references (e.g., 'Signals 3, 7').
Section 5 must contain temporal framing: use specific timeframes (e.g., '0-6 months', 'by 2028', 'within the next year').
